name: Carpenter Center
description: Carpenter Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gering, NE. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Oregon Trail Park
description: Oregon Trail Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gering, NE. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Westmoor Park
description: Come play pickleball at Westmoor Park in Scottsbluff, NE! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
